overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a player walking along a wet coastal residential street on a sunny morning. The player emerges from an alley between buildings, walks past various parked and moving vehicles along a hillside road, and approaches a convenience store before the character dies at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between buildings opening to residential street

events.description: exits narrow alley between green wooden buildings onto open residential street

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage between buildings and emerging onto the street, passing a parked red jeep

notable_agents.action: red jeep wrangler parked at the alley exit

entered.detail: light green wooden siding building with white trim and garage doors
black metal fence with wooden posts running along the right side
sandy beige hillside with sparse green vegetation
stacked wooden crates and boxes in the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow alley between a green wooden building and a metal fence. The player walks forward past wooden crates and emerges onto a wet asphalt street, transitioning from the enclosed alley to an open residential area with a sandy hillside visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal residential street with hillside on left and houses on right

events.description: white SUV drives past from right to left on the wet street
black sedan approaches and drives past in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet residential street, passing utility poles and trash bins on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving down the street past the player
black sedan driving along the road in the distance

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with street lamp and power lines
black trash bins and white garbage bags on the sidewalk
white rectangular speed limit sign showing 25

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open residential street with a sandy hillside on the left and houses on the right. The asphalt is wet and reflective. The player passes utility poles and trash bins while several vehicles drive by, including a white SUV and a black sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street transitioning to small commercial area with convenience store

events.description: player character dies, screen displays 'Wasted' text indicating suicide or death

agents.ego_description: approaching the convenience store at the end of the block before suddenly dying

entered.detail: 7-Eleven style convenience store with green and orange signage and glass front
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk
blue recycling dumpster behind white fence
white picket fence in front of the store

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a commercial area with a convenience store on the right. The player passes a yellow fire hydrant and blue dumpster before reaching the store front. Suddenly, the player character dies and the screen displays the 'Wasted' text, ending the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined urban alleyway out onto a bright, wet coastal residential street. It begins within a narrow passage between a green wooden building and a metal fence, moving past wooden crates before emerging onto reflective asphalt. As the camera advances, the enclosed space opens up into a hillside neighborhood where the player passes utility poles and trash bins while vehicles like a white SUV and a black sedan drive by. The scene then shifts toward a commercial area, gliding past a yellow fire hydrant and a blue dumpster toward the storefront of a convenience store. Finally, the movement abruptly ends as the character dies and the screen displays the Wasted text.
